tutorial.welcome_desc: Explore the real world to find hidden digital treasures. Connect your wallet to start your journey.
tutorial.find_desc: Walk around your neighborhood. When you see a Crystal on the map, get close to it!
tutorial.ar_desc: Tap 'AR Hunt' to open your camera. Find the floating crystal and tap it to claim your reward.
tutorial.build_desc: Collect Crystals and Artifacts. Trade them on the marketplace or use them to craft upgrades.
